form.label: Traffic by Source IP with TCP Duration (DEPRECATED)

search.query: | `dedup_timechart_events` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, l_src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes_in) by src_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| fillnull value="" src_host | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | eval exp_ip_host_port=exp_ip."#".src_ip."#".l_src_host."#".src_port | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as outbytes sum(sum_bytes_out) as inbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as outpackets sum(sum_packets_out) as inpackets sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections avg(avg_tcp_duration) as avgtcpduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip_host_port | eval temp=split(exp_ip_host_port,"#") | eval exp_ip=mvindex(temp,0) | eval ip=mvindex(temp,1) | eval host=mvindex(temp,2) | eval port=mvindex(temp,3) | eval "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %"=round((inbytes/outbytes)*100,2) | eval "Packets Rcvd/Sent %"=round((inpackets/outpackets)*100,2) | eval outmegabytes = outbytes/1024/1024 | eval inmegabytes = inbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - outmegabytes | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, outmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, inmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Sent, outpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Received, inpackets)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name ip port host "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %" "Packets Sent" "Packets Received" "Packets Rcvd/Sent %" Connections, avgtcpduration | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename ip as "Source IP" | rename port as "Source Port" | rename host as "Source Host" | rename avgtcpduration as "Avg TCP duration"

`netflow_search_rule_20867` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | `sampling(bytes)` | eventstats sum(bytes) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(bytes_out) as sum_bytes_out sum(packets_out) as sum_packets_out sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count avg(tcp_duration) as avg_tcp_duration by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host transport flow_smpl_id sum_by_exp _time | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(sum_packets_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | `sampling(sum_packets_out)` | `sampling(sum_flow_count)` | fillnull value="" src_host | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | eval exp_ip_host_port=exp_ip."#".src_ip."#".l_src_host."#".src_port | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as outbytes sum(sum_bytes_out) as inbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as outpackets sum(sum_packets_out) as inpackets sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections avg(avg_tcp_duration) as avgtcpduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip_host_port | eval temp=split(exp_ip_host_port,"#") | eval exp_ip=mvindex(temp,0) | eval ip=mvindex(temp,1) | eval host=mvindex(temp,2) | eval port=mvindex(temp,3) | eval "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %"=round((inbytes/outbytes)*100,2) | eval "Packets Rcvd/Sent %"=round((inpackets/outpackets)*100,2) | eval outmegabytes = outbytes/1024/1024 | eval inmegabytes = inbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - outmegabytes | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, outmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, inmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Sent, outpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Received, inpackets)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name ip port host "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %" "Packets Sent" "Packets Received" "Packets Rcvd/Sent %" Connections, avgtcpduration | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename ip as "Source IP" | rename port as "Source Port" | rename host as "Source Host" | rename avgtcpduration as "Avg TCP duration"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module â€ś10867: Top Traffic Monitor Geo Cityâ€ť (syslogs with nfc_id=20867). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received. This Module is packaged in NFO â€śEnhanced Traffic Monitor 2â€ť Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
